raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un schis irr tahs Grab-
matas Eekſchu-Raksts/ ko tas
Kehniſch Artasastus Eſrum
tam Preesteam/ tam Rakſtu-
Mahzitajam dewe/ kas bija weens
Rakſtu-Mahzitajs eckſch teem
Wahrdeem ta KUNGA Bauf-
ta/ un winna Littumeem pahr
Israëlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Artasastus/ tas Kehniſch
to Kehnizu/ Eſrum tam Pree-
ſteram un Rakſtu-Mahzitajam
eekſch tahs Baufſibas ta Deewa
no Debbes/ piſnigu (Meeru)
un Apfweizinaſchanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No mannim tohp paweh-
lehts/ ka wiſs/ kam tas Prahts
neffahs manna Walſtiba no
teem Israëta Landim/ un no
teem Preesteriem un Lewiteein
ns Jeruſalemi ect/ tas war ar
tewim ect.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tu no ta Keh-
nina un winna feptineem Pa-
dohma-Devejeem fuhtihts eſti/
iswaizaht pahr Juhdu un Jeru-
falemi/ pehz tawa Deewa Banf-
twas/ kas tawa Rohta irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un us turren weſt to
Sudrabu un Seltn/ ko tas keh-
niſch un winna Padohma-De-
weji ar labbu Prahtu irr dewn-
cht tam Israëta Deewam/ kur-
ka Mahjas-Weeta Jerusale-
mē irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Lihds ar wiſſu Sudrabu
an Seltn/ ko tu wiſſa Babeles
Walſta atrast warri/ ar to lab-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka tew ahtri par to Nau-
du irr japirſ Wehrſchi/ Auni/
Jehri ar winnu Ehdamo-Uppu-
reem/ un winnu Dserkamo-Up-
pureem/ un tohs uppure us to
Altari juhz Deewa Namina/
kas Jeruſalemē irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ka tew un taweem
Brahteem Prahts neffahs ar to
zittu Sudrabu unSeltn darriht/
to warrat juhs darriht pehz juh-
fu Deewa Brahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tohs Rikſus/ kas
jums tsdohti juhz Deewa
Namman par Kalpoſchanu/tohs
nodohdeet preekſch Deewa Jeru-
salemē.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas atleeſans/ kas tew
wehl buhs waijaga preekſch tawa
Deewa Namma/ kas tew nahk-
fees tsdoht/tam buhs no taKehni-
na Mantu-Naina dohtam tapt-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un no mannim to Kehni-
xu Artasastu tohp pawehlehts
wiſſeem Mantu-Sargeem/ kas
winapufs Uppeß irr/ ka juhs
wiſſu/ ko Eſrus tas Preesteris
un Rakſta-Mahzitajs eekſch tahs
Baufſibas ta Deewa no Debbes
no jums praffibs/ drihs darrit/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lihds jints Talenteem
Sudraba/ un lihds jints Roh-
reem Kweeſchu/ un lihds jints
Batteem Wyna/ un lihds jints
Batteem Efjes/ un Sahls bes
Mehra.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
